prompt: What are the latest news stories about Anthropic from the past week? Give me a bullet list of 5 headlines with a one-sentence summary each.

assertions.name: uses_nimble_search
assertions.description: The agent ran nimble search with a query about Anthropic

assertions.name: uses_news_focus_or_time_range
assertions.description: The search used --focus news or --time-range week/day to get recent results

assertions.name: has_five_bullets
assertions.description: The output contains at least 5 bullet points or numbered items
